_comment: Sample legacy claude-config.json (the old template-engine schema) used as a fixture by migrate.test.mjs to lock in the translateLegacyConfig mapping. Mirrors a realistic pnpm game repo: project name, BASE_BRANCH, PACKAGE_MANAGER/TEST_COMMAND variables, HAS_* feature flags, and the VALIDATION/REVIEW command blocks that map onto commands.* in .gvt-agent.json.

blocks.VALIDATION_COMMANDS_BASH:
pnpm run lint
pnpm run levels:validate
pnpm run test:min
blocks.REVIEW_COMMANDS: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:min
